(define (o+ a b) (min a b))
(define (ox a b) (+ a b))

;; Outer structure: (A ⊕ B) ⊗ C  where
;; A = (((... ⊗ ...) ⊕ (... ⊗ ...)) ⊗ ((... ⊗ ...) ⊕ (... ⊗ ...)))
;; B = ((... ⊗ ...) ⊗ (... ⊗ ...)) similar
;; C = ((...) ⊕ (...))

;; Let me build helpers for the leaf pattern (x⊕y)⊕(z⊕w) = min of four
(define (m4 a b c d) (min a b c d))

;; A block is ((m4) ⊗ (m4)) i.e. two-group tensor
(define (blk a b c d e f g h) (ox (m4 a b c d) (m4 e f g h)))

;; First big group G1: 
;; ((blk1 ⊕ blk2) ⊗ (blk3 ⊕ blk4))
(define G1
  (ox
    (o+ (blk 36 39 23 18  35 70 89 46)
        (blk 17 59 22 24  89 7 97 24))
    (o+ (blk 88 20 53 83  80 63 70 4)
        (blk 39 29 66 47  70 12 60 88))))

;; Second big group G2:
;; ((blk5 ⊕ blk6) ⊗ (blk7 ⊕ blk8))
(define G2
  (ox
    (o+ (blk 96 53 20 42  19 92 66 6)
        (blk 61 1 8 13    46 76 91 90))
    (o+ (blk 33 43 97 4   21 65 25 12)
        (blk 55 85 56 26  22 31 29 85))))

;; Third big group G3:
;; ((blk9 ⊕ blk10) ⊗ (blk11 ⊕ blk12))
(define G3
  (ox
    (o+ (blk 64 28 48 21  69 55 93 55)
        (blk 59 47 91 27  40 81 95 57))
    (o+ (blk 72 78 62 12  28 95 26 15)
        (blk 97 11 46 92  87 80 89 21))))

;; Fourth big group G4:
(define G4
  (ox
    (o+ (blk 15 23 27 83  56 25 55 4)
        (blk 71 19 83 82  35 37 95 47))
    (o+ (blk 51 2 62 67   59 35 46 63)
        (blk 18 14 19 72  29 46 59 49))))

(list G1 G2 G3 G4)
(ox (o+ G1 G2) (o+ G3 G4))

  string-ci=?                 [strings]      Returns #t if all strings are equal after case folding.
  string-ci>=?                [strings]      Returns #t if strings are monotonically non-increasing after case folding.
  string-ci>?                 [strings]      Returns #t if strings are monotonically decreasing after case folding.
  string-copy                 [strings]      Returns a mutable copy of STRING from START to end. START defaults to 0, end to string length.
  string-copy!                [strings]      Copies characters from the from string into TO starting at position AT.
  string-downcase             [strings]      Returns a new string with all characters converted to lowercase using full Unicode case mapping.
  string-fill!                [strings]      Fills STRING positions from start to end with CHAR. Start defaults to 0, end to STRING length.
  string-foldcase             [strings]      Returns a new string with full Unicode case folding applied. Useful for case-insensitive comparison.
  string-for-each             [strings]      Apply F to each character of string S for its side effects.
  string-length               [strings]      Returns the number of characters in STRING.
  string-map                  [strings]      Apply F to each character of string S, returning a new string
  string-ref                  [strings]      Returns the character at 0-based index K in STRING. Raises an error if K is out of range.
  string-set!                 [strings]      Stores CHAR at 0-based index K in STRING. STRING must be mutable.
  string-setoid               [not imported] (wile algebra) — Algebraic structures, equational rewriting, and symbolic normalization. Structures: setoids, orders, lattices, closure operators, Heyting/Boolean algebras, monoids, categories, semirings, groups, rings, differential rings, fields. Rewriting: axiom-driven term normalization. Symbolic: theory projections, recursive normalization, transformation tracing.
  string-upcase               [strings]      Returns a new string with all characters converted to uppercase using full Unicode case mapping.
  string<=?                   [strings]      Returns #t if string arguments are monotonically non-decreasing in lexicographic order.
  string<?                    [strings]      Returns #t if string arguments are monotonically increasing in lexicographic order.
  string=?                    [strings]      Returns #t if all string arguments have the same sequence of characters.
  string>=?                   [strings]      Returns #t if string arguments are monotonically non-increasing in lexicographic order.
  string>?                    [strings]      Returns #t if string arguments are monotonically decreasing in lexicographic order.
  string?                     [predicates]   Returns #t if OBJ is a string. Strings are sequences of characters.
  substring                   [strings]      Returns a newly allocated string containing characters of STRING from START (inclusive) to END (exclusive).
  symbol->string              [strings]      Returns the name of SYMBOL as an immutable string.
  syntax-error                [macros]       Signals a compile-time error during macro expansion.
  syntax-source               [syntax]       Returns the source file name of STX as a string, or #f if unavailable.
  textual-port?               [ports]        Returns #t if OBJ is a textual (character-based) port.
  thread-name                 [threads]      Returns the name of THREAD as a string, or #f if unnamed.
  utf8->string                [bytevectors]  Decodes BYTEVECTOR as UTF-8 to a string from START to end. Raises an error on invalid UTF-8.
  vector->string              [vectors]      Returns a string formed from the characters in VECTOR from START to end. Elements must be characters.
  write                       [io]           Writes a machine-readable (write) representation of OBJ to PORT. Strings are quoted, characters use #\ notation.
  write-char                  [io]           Writes CHAR to PORT. Defaults to current-output-port.
  write-shared                [io]           Like write, but always uses datum labels to show shared and circular structure.
  write-simple                [io]           Like write, but does not use datum labels for shared structure.

;; Parse into an AST: expression is either a number, or (LP expr OP expr RP).
(define (parse toks)
  ;; returns (ast . rest)
  (cond
    ((number? (car toks)) (cons (car toks) (cdr toks)))
    ((eq? (car toks) 'LP)
     (let* ((r1 (parse (cdr toks)))
            (left (car r1))
            (rest1 (cdr r1))
            (op (car rest1))
            (r2 (parse (cdr rest1)))
            (right (car r2))
            (rest2 (cdr r2)))
       ;; rest2 should start with RP
       (cons (list (if (eq? op 'OP-ADD) 'MIN '+) left right) (cdr rest2))))
    (else (error "bad"))))

(define ast (car (parse toks)))
;; Now evaluate
(define (evl a)
  (if (number? a) a
    (let ((op (car a)) (l (evl (cadr a))) (r (evl (caddr a))))
      (if (eq? op 'MIN) (min l r) (+ l r)))))

(evl ast)

(define expr-test "(17 ⊕ 57)")
(tokenize expr-test)

(define (tokenize s)
  (let loop ((i 0) (acc '()))
    (if (>= i (string-length s)) (reverse acc)
      (let ((c (string-ref s i)))
        (cond
          ((char=? c #\space) (loop (+ i 1) acc))
          ((char=? c #\() (loop (+ i 1) (cons 'LP acc)))
          ((char=? c #\)) (loop (+ i 1) (cons 'RP acc)))
          ((char=? c #\⊕) (loop (+ i 1) (cons 'OP-ADD acc)))
          ((char=? c #\⊗) (loop (+ i 1) (cons 'OP-MUL acc)))
          ((char-numeric? c)
           (let numloop ((j i))
             (if (and (< j (string-length s)) (char-numeric? (string-ref s j)))
                 (numloop (+ j 1))
                 (loop j (cons (string->number (substring s i j)) acc)))))
          (else (loop (+ i 1) acc)))))))
(tokenize "(17 ⊕ 57)")

(define toks (tokenize expr))
(define (parse toks)
  (cond
    ((number? (car toks)) (cons (car toks) (cdr toks)))
    ((eq? (car toks) 'LP)
     (let* ((r1 (parse (cdr toks)))
            (left (car r1))
            (rest1 (cdr r1))
            (op (car rest1))
            (r2 (parse (cdr rest1)))
            (right (car r2))
            (rest2 (cdr r2)))
       (cons (list (if (eq? op 'OP-ADD) 'MIN '+) left right) (cdr rest2))))
    (else (error "bad"))))
(define ast (car (parse toks)))
(define (evl a)
  (if (number? a) a
    (let ((op (car a)) (l (evl (cadr a))) (r (evl (caddr a))))
      (if (eq? op 'MIN) (min l r) (+ l r)))))
(evl ast)

(define (tokenize s)
  (let loop ((i 0) (toks '()))
    (if (>= i (string-length s))
        (reverse toks)
        (let ((c (string-ref s i)))
          (cond
            ((char-whitespace? c) (loop (+ i 1) toks))
            ((char=? c #\() (loop (+ i 1) (cons 'LP toks)))
            ((char=? c #\)) (loop (+ i 1) (cons 'RP toks)))
            ((char=? c #\+) (loop (+ i 1) (cons 'PLUS toks)))
            ((char=? c #\*) (loop (+ i 1) (cons 'TIMES toks)))
            (else
              ;; number
              (let lp ((j i))
                (if (and (< j (string-length s))
                         (char-numeric? (string-ref s j)))
                    (lp (+ j 1))
                    (loop j (cons (string->number (substring s i j)) toks))))))))))

(import (srfi 1))
(define (U a b) (lset-union eq? a b))
(define (I a b) (lset-intersection eq? a b))
(define (ss s) (sort (delete-duplicates s eq?) (lambda (x y) (string<? (symbol->string x) (symbol->string y)))))

;; Left
(define L1 (I '(c d e g h j k l o) '(f n)))
(define L2 (I L1 '(a c i)))
(define LEFT (U L2 '(a c d e f g h i k l m n o p)))

;; Right side - inner parts
;; Part A: {f,h,i,k,l,m,n,o} ∩ ( ({d,i,j,k,l,o} ∪ {a,b,d,f,h,i,k,l,m,n,o,p}) ∩ ({a,b,c,d,e,f,g,h,i,j,k,l,n,o,p} ∩ {a,c,d,f,h,j,n,p}) )
(define A1 (U '(d i j k l o) '(a b d f h i k l m n o p)))
(define A2 (I '(a b c d e f g h i j k l n o p) '(a c d f h j n p)))
(define A3 (I A1 A2))
(define A (I '(f h i k l m n o) A3))

;; Part B: {b,h,i,m,n,o} ∩ ( ({a,b,c,d,g,i,j,l,n,p} ∩ {b,c,d,e,f,h,m,n}) ∩ {b,d,f,h,j,p} )
(define B1 (I '(a b c d g i j l n p) '(b c d e f h m n)))
(define B2 (I B1 '(b d f h j p)))
(define B (I '(b h i m n o) B2))

(define AB (I A B))

;; Part C: ({b,c,d,e,h,j,k,o} ∩ {f,m}) ∩ (( ({e,f,h,l} ∩ {a,d,e,j,p}) ∪ {b,c,d,e,f,g,i,k,l,m,n,o,p} ) ∩ ({a,b,c,d,e,f,g,h,i,j,k,l,m,n,p} ∪ {a,b,c,d,e,f,h,i,j,k,l,m,n,p}))
(define C1 (I '(b c d e h j k o) '(f m)))
(define C2 (U (I '(e f h l) '(a d e j p)) '(b c d e f g i k l m n o p)))
(define C3 (U '(a b c d e f g h i j k l m n p) '(a b c d e f h i j k l m n p)))
(define C4 (I C2 C3))
(define C (I C1 C4))

(define ABC (I AB C))

;; Then union with: ({a,d,f,i,j,k,l} ∩ ({a,c,d,e,f,g,h,i,l,m,n,o,p} ∪ {a,h}))
(define D1 (U '(a c d e f g h i l m n o p) '(a h)))
(define D (I '(a d f i j k l) D1))

(define RIGHT (U ABC D))

(define RESULT (I LEFT RIGHT))
(display "LEFT: ") (display (ss LEFT)) (newline)
(display "A: ") (display (ss A)) (newline)
(display "B: ") (display (ss B)) (newline)
(display "AB: ") (display (ss AB)) (newline)
(display "C: ") (display (ss C)) (newline)
(display "ABC: ") (display (ss ABC)) (newline)
(display "D: ") (display (ss D)) (newline)
(display "RIGHT: ") (display (ss RIGHT)) (newline)
(display "RESULT: ") (display (ss RESULT)) (newline)

(define (sym<? a b) (string<? (symbol->string a) (symbol->string b)))
(define (union2 a b)
  (cond ((null? a) b)
        ((null? b) a)
        ((eq? (car a) (car b)) (cons (car a) (union2 (cdr a) (cdr b))))
        ((sym<? (car a) (car b)) (cons (car a) (union2 (cdr a) b)))
        (else (cons (car b) (union2 a (cdr b))))))
(define (inter2 a b)
  (cond ((null? a) '())
        ((null? b) '())
        ((eq? (car a) (car b)) (cons (car a) (inter2 (cdr a) (cdr b))))
        ((sym<? (car a) (car b)) (inter2 (cdr a) b))
        (else (inter2 a (cdr b)))))
(define (S . xs) (sort xs sym<?))

              (I '(b i j k n p) (U '(a b d e g i k l m n) '(b f g k o p)))))

(define m2a (I '(a b c e f g i j k l m n o p)
               (I (U '(d i l m o p) (I '(b c d e f h i j n o p) (I '(b e) '(a b c e f h j k l n o))))
                  '(b h i p))))

               (I '(o) '(c d e f i j k l m n o p))))
(define m2b2 (I '(c e k) (U '(j l m o p) '(a b c d f g h i m n o p))))

(define m123 (I m12 m3))

(define n1 (U (U '(b c h i k l m o p) (U (I '(b i k m) '(b c d e f g h j k m n o)) '(b e i j l n p)))
              (U '(a d g j k n p) '(a f h j l n o))))
(define n2 (U (U '(i p) '(f o)) (I '(o) '(i))))

(define p12 (I p1 p2))

(define n123 (I n12 p12))

(define big (I (I m123 n123) r2))

;; Now right side
(define q1 (I (U '(d) '(b c k l m o p)) (I '(d g p) '(a b f i l n o p))))

(define q2a (I '(a c e g i k l m n o)
               (U '(a b c d e g i j l m o p) (U (U '(a b c d e f g h i j k l m o p) '(a b c d f m o p)) '(a b c d f h i j k l m n o p)))))
(define q2b (I '(b c d e f g h i j k l m n o p) (I '(b g h m) (I '(a e g i k l n o) '(a b c e f g)))))

(define q3 (U (U q3a (U '(c f g i) '(b k o))) (U '(a b d e j l o p) '(c e f g h j l m p))))

(define q23 (I q2 q3))

(define right (U q1 q23))

(define final (I big right))

arguments.code:
(define (sym->bit s)
  (arithmetic-shift 1 (- (char->integer (string-ref (symbol->string s) 0)) (char->integer #\a))))
(define (S . syms) (apply + (map sym->bit syms)))
(define (U a b) (bit-or a b))
(define (I a b) (bit-and a b))
(define (bits->set n)
  (let loop ((i 0) (n n) (acc '()))
    (if (= n 0) (reverse acc)
        (if (odd? n)
            (loop (+ i 1) (arithmetic-shift n -1) (cons (string->symbol (string (integer->char (+ i (char->integer #\a))))) acc))
            (loop (+ i 1) (arithmetic-shift n -1) acc)))))
(bits->set (S 'a 'c 'z))

  (sort (lambda (x y) (string<? (symbol->string x) (symbol->string y))) s))
(sort-set (U (S 'a 'c) (S 'b 'a)))

(define result

          (S 'b 'd 'g 'h 'i 'j 'l 'o))

                    (I (S 'c 'd 'e 'f 'g 'h 'j 'l 'n 'o 'p) (S 'd 'h 'i 'm 'o)))
                 (U (S 'e 'j) (S 'a 'b 'c 'g 'i 'k)))
               (I (S 'a 'b 'c 'd 'e 'f 'g 'j 'k 'l 'm 'n 'o 'p)
                  (I
                    (I (S 'h 'k 'l) (S 'a 'b 'c 'd 'e 'f 'g 'h 'i 'k 'l 'n 'o 'p))
                    (I

          (S 'a 'd 'f 'g 'h 'j 'l 'm 'n 'o 'p)))
      (I
        (U
          (I (S 'b 'c 'g 'n)
             (I
               (I (S 'a 'b 'c 'd 'e 'f 'g 'h 'i 'j 'k 'l 'm 'n 'p) (S 'a 'b 'c 'd 'e 'f 'g 'h 'i 'l 'm 'n 'o 'p))
               (U (S 'd 'e 'f 'g 'j 'k 'm 'n 'o 'p) (S 'g))))
          (U (S 'g 'i 'l 'n 'p) (S 'i)))
        (I (S 'c 'd 'e 'f 'h 'i 'j 'k 'l 'm 'n 'o 'p) (S 'a 'e 'm 'n))))

    (U
      (I

             (U (S 'b 'c 'd 'e 'h 'i 'j 'k 'l 'o 'p) (S 'b 'f 'i 'j 'l 'm 'n 'o)))
          (U (S 'b 'e 'g) (S 'a 'f 'g 'j 'k 'l 'm 'n 'o 'p)))
        (U
          (I (S 'c 'e 'o) (S 'f 'h 'l))
          (I
            (U (S 'e 'g 'i 'k 'l 'o 'p)
               (I (I (S 'e 'f 'i 'k 'p) (S 'a 'b 'd 'e 'g 'h 'k 'l)) (S 'a 'e 'g 'k 'm)))
            (I (S 'a 'b 'd 'g 'h 'i 'j 'k 'm 'p)
               (I
                 (I (S 'a 'b 'c 'f 'g 'i 'j 'm 'o) (S 'a 'b 'c 'd 'e 'h 'j 'l 'm 'n 'o))
                 (I (S 'l) (S 'f 'j 'l 'o)))))))
      (U
        (I
          (U
            (I (S 'a 'h 'p) (S 'b 'f 'g 'h 'i 'm 'n 'o))
            (U
              (I
                (I (S 'b 'c 'e 'h 'l 'n) (S 'a 'n 'p))
                (I (S 'b 'c 'd 'f 'g 'i 'j 'k 'l 'm 'n 'o 'p)
                   (U (I (S 'a 'j) (S 'a 'b 'c 'd 'e 'g 'h 'i 'j 'k 'l 'm 'p))
                      (U (S 'b 'd 'f 'g 'h 'i 'j 'k 'l 'm 'o) (S 'a 'c 'd 'e 'f 'h 'i 'j 'l 'm 'n 'o 'p)))))

                (I (S 'c 'd 'e 'f 'g 'h 'i 'j 'k 'l 'm 'p) (S 'c 'g 'h)))))
          (U

            (U (S 'b 'c 'e 'j 'k 'l 'm) (S 'e 'i 'k 'l 'o))))
        (U
          (U
            (U (S 'a 'b 'c 'd 'e 'f 'g 'h 'i 'j 'k 'l 'm 'o 'p) (S 'a 'b 'd 'g 'i 'k 'l 'n 'o))
            (U

              (I

                (I (S 'a 'b 'c 'd 'e 'f 'g 'h 'i 'j 'k 'm 'n 'p)

          (I

              (S 'b 'c 'd 'e 'f 'g 'h 'i 'j 'k 'l 'm 'n 'o))
            (I
              (U (S 'a 'b 'e 'f 'g 'h 'i 'j 'k 'l 'm 'n 'o 'p) (S 'a 'b 'c 'd 'e 'f 'i 'j 'm 'n 'o 'p))
              (S 'a 'd 'e 'f 'h 'i 'j 'k 'm 'n 'p))))))))
